prediction: OneCell is expected to lose a fair total-system comparison unless fixed central parameters plus bounded exact state and verified abstractions reduce future held-out search cost across transfer workloads without exporting intelligence into adapters, retrieval, tools, verifiers, task identity, voting, or growing outer compute.
clean_defeat_conditions: held-out solve rate fails to exceed the strongest equal-total-lifecycle-cost comparator by the preregistered meaningful effect on both the source and transfer workload
median future search cost fails to fall by at least 20 percent against no-library and retrieval-only controls on both workloads
adapter trainable parameters exceed the frozen central cell parameters or an unreported general model performs semantic translation
retrieval, a tool, a verifier, task identity, benchmark-authored skill, sampling, or voting supplies answer-bearing information not given to comparators
outer search, verification, or total inference compute rises by more than 5 percent while capability is described as accumulating at fixed cost
false abstraction activation, unsafe release, authority widening, exact-state loss, failed rollback, or descendant invalidation exceeds the matched strong baseline
a strong Transformer, recurrent/state-space system, exact-search controller, or simple hybrid dominates the complete preregistered frontier
signed_by: active ASI Stack roadmap execution record
